name: markdown-video-audio
displayName: Markdown Video Audio — play videos with sound in Markdown preview
description: Play MP4/MOV/M4V videos embedded in the VS Code Markdown preview with sound, by pairing the muted video with an audio track around the webview's missing AAC codec. Extracts the audio automatically with ffmpeg.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Renders local MP4/MOV/M4V as a muted video paired with an audio track, reading only local files already in the workspace. In an untrusted workspace, automatic ffmpeg extraction is disabled and only a manually placed sibling audio file is used; trusting the workspace enables extraction. WebM plays with native audio.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Playback needs a real on-disk file path for the video, plus a local ffmpeg to extract its audio (or a manually placed sibling audio file).

markdownVideoAudio.enabled.description: Enable audio playback for videos in the Markdown preview.

markdownVideoAudio.ffmpegPath.description: Reserved (override not yet wired): path to the ffmpeg executable for automatic audio extraction. Extraction currently always searches PATH; this override has no effect yet.

markdownVideoAudio.autoplay.description: Reserved (not yet active): autoplay videos when the preview opens (muted; audio resumes on first interaction).

markdownVideoAudio.maxSyncDriftMs.description: Reserved (not yet wired): target maximum drift between audio and video before correction (ms). Currently fixed at 250 ms.

markdownVideoAudio.cacheDirName.description: Reserved (override not yet wired): directory name for the extracted-audio cache, created under the workspace (must be inside localResourceRoots). The cache dir name is currently fixed at .vscode-md-video-cache.

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run typecheck:webview && npm run build:preview
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run clean && npm run build
